service_account_and_agent_identity_desig.service_account_id_lifecycle: future design only: issue, rotate, revoke, owner bind, and audit service accounts before production onboarding
service_account_and_agent_identity_desig.agent_id_binding: agent_id is bound to AgentTalk read model or future agent registry; it is not executor identity
service_account_and_agent_identity_desig.agent_session_id_binding: agent_session_id must be server-created and tenant/workflow scoped in future production design
service_account_and_agent_identity_desig.actor_type_policy: future actor_type values are human_user, service_account, and agent; all are server-bound
service_account_and_agent_identity_desig.human_user_vs_service_account_vs_agent: human users may confirm operations in panels; service accounts require explicit future policy; agents remain propose/handoff/explain/navigate only
service_account_and_agent_identity_desig.source_agent_boundary: source=agent remains proposal/handoff only and cannot execute mutation
